title: Diamond block deepslate
description: This only changes underground block to the diamond block texture mostly to hide your base
body: With this Minecraft texture pack, all of the underground blocks will be changed to a diamond style when applied to the game. The goal of this pack is to make your base harder to be found in a video, especially if you're playing on DonutSMP. Since the underground looks completely different with this pack, players will have a tougher time locating your base. It's also easy and straightforward to obtain.
